title: Learn in the Interpreter's House
description: Grace has welcomed you; now let truth train your sight before the harder road.
description_zh: 恩典已经接纳你；在更艰难的路前，让真理训练你的眼光。

steps.description: Consider a room and let it question your heart.
steps.description_zh: 默想一个房间，让它叩问你的心。

steps.description: Leave by the far door with clearer sight.
steps.description_zh: 带着更清楚的眼光，从远门离开。
